boundary_binding.action_boundary: May finance book, release, defer, capitalize, consolidate, or recognize the requested accounting action now? Focus: commission accrual true-up inside signed compensation plan.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No closed source match on required dependency
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Dependency record missing or mismatched before execution

critical_features_preserved: comp plan, period, and employee class match
final_answer: Source records do not close the exact action boundary. The control record says the required comp plan, period, and employee class match is missing, stale, mismatched, expired, or scoped differently. Policy requires exact source closure before execution, so the action should be escalated rather than booked now.
